# Embedded Firmware Sprint — 4-week schedule

## Week 1 — Foundation

- [ ] Set up toolchain (gcc-arm, openocd)
- [ ] Read STM32 reference manual chapters 1-3
- [ ] Order Nucleo board + sensors

## Week 2 — Bring-up

- [ ] First boot + LED blink
- [ ] Configure UART + clock tree
- [ ] **EXAM**: bring-up review with mentor

## Week 3 — Application

- [ ] Write I2C driver for IMU
- [ ] Implement 100Hz sampling loop
- [ ] Add SD-card data logger

## Week 4 — Integration

- [ ] 4-hour battery endurance test
- [ ] **EXAM**: final demo to advisor
- [ ] Write final report
